value.found_quote: On February 8, 2024, Bard and Duet AI were unified under the Gemini brand, with a mobile app launched on Android and the service integrated into the Google app on iOS.
value.rationale: The page describes the Gemini mobile app developed by Google, launched on Android and integrated into iOS, and references "the Gemini mobile app" and the "Gemini app" as a current Google offering through which models are made available.
